## 📋 PR Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` locally with no errors (or fixed them)
- [ ] I have run `npm run test:unit` locally and all tests pass
- [ ] I have tested my changes manually (if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new console warnings
